notes: Used useWorkspace() context to get workspace.id — avoids adding prop to tools-canvas-view.tsx (outside ownership). Fetches all steps via /api/v1/steps?workspace_id= on workspace mount to build stepId→tabId map. Step names in Step Usage section now render as clickable buttons matching tool-analysis-view.tsx pattern (text-[var(--accent-blue)] hover:underline cursor-pointer). Falls back to plain text span if tab_id not yet loaded.
